title: Number of licenses that can be purchased
doc_html:
§307.3.  Number of licenses that can be purchased

A validly licensed commercial fisherman or wholesale/retail dealer may purchase any number of transport licenses.  

Acts 1986, No. 904, §1.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 904, §5.}}
